title: Exquisite Spring Polish Dum Dumplings
description: A tangy and springy Polish dish featuring lemon zest and Mediterranean-friendly ingredients, perfect for a date night.
instructions: Combine flour, warm water, and a pinch of salt in a large mixing bowl to form a smooth dough.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes elastic and smooth.
Divide the dough into smaller pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk shape using a rolling pin.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the garlic and dried dill to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the lemon zest to the skillet and cook for an additional minute.
Place the dumpling disks in the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Serve the dumplings hot with a side of farmers cheese and a sprinkle of potato starch.
